about.title: Turning ideas into experiences.
about.bio: I'm an 18-year-old creative professional based in Portugal, passionate about technology, web development, photography, video editing and artificial intelligence. I build modern digital experiences that combine creativity, performance and innovation — and I'm constantly learning new tools to deliver high-quality work.
about.mission: To craft digital experiences that feel human, elegant and future-ready — bridging creative vision with technical execution.
about.goals: Grow into a senior Creative Developer, build an independent creative studio and ship AI-powered products that make a real impact.
about.mindset: Curious by default, detail-obsessed by habit. I treat every project as a craft — learning fast, iterating often and caring about the small things.

values.title: Creativity
values.text: Ideas first — design that surprises and delights.

values.title: Curiosity
values.text: Always learning, always exploring what's next.

values.title: Quality
values.text: Details matter. Polish is not optional.

values.title: Consistency
values.text: Show up, iterate, and keep the standard high.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of work spanning web development, creative direction and AI.

items.title: SSDoces
items.description: Modern e-commerce website for a local confectionery business.
items.problem: A local confectionery needed an online presence to sell products and manage orders efficiently.
items.solution: Built a full e-commerce platform with cart, checkout, admin dashboard and automated email notifications.
items.result: A smooth end-to-end shopping experience with an easy admin workflow for the business owner.

items.title: Portfolio Website
items.description: Premium personal portfolio with cinematic motion and multilingual support.
items.problem: Needed a memorable, professional presence to attract recruiters, agencies and premium clients.
items.solution: Designed and built an award-style portfolio with Framer Motion, glassmorphism and EN/PT i18n.
items.result: A fast, accessible, SEO-ready site that scales as new work is added.

items.title: Future AI Projects
items.description: A space prepared to showcase AI automations and intelligent applications.
items.problem: AI moves fast — I wanted a dedicated home for upcoming intelligent products.
items.solution: Prepared a scalable section ready to feature automations, chatbots and AI tools.
items.result: Ready to grow — new AI projects will slot in without any redesign.
